markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content performance, strategy, and technical SEO issues.](https://fathom.video/share/hGcwBdh-CnMSEfK7CmMAHkosRXP2B5MA?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Performance Stabilizing:** Overall traffic is down \~2% WoW, but non-branded clicks grew 2.8%—the first positive week since October's volatility began. This suggests refreshed content is effectively offsetting broader declines.](https://fathom.video/share/hGcwBdh-CnMSEfK7CmMAHkosRXP2B5MA?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)
  - [**Technical SEO Risks:** Critical technical issues—GA4 duplicates, UTM crawl waste, and a lack of external links—are hurting site authority and visibility. Hadassah will escalate these internally.](https://fathom.video/share/hGcwBdh-CnMSEfK7CmMAHkosRXP2B5MA?tab=summary&timestamp=955.0)
  - [**LLM Visibility Rebounding:** LLM traffic rebounded sharply last week, though positioning dropped. This confirms that mid-tier rankings (2-4) are valuable for driving clicks, as users often compare options.](https://fathom.video/share/hGcwBdh-CnMSEfK7CmMAHkosRXP2B5MA?tab=summary&timestamp=817.0)
  - [**Content Pipeline & Training:** Outreach will review 63 new content ideas in Airtable. GrowthX will investigate a data discrepancy in the Gong analysis and explore hosting an LLM training session for the Outreach team.](https://fathom.video/share/hGcwBdh-CnMSEfK7CmMAHkosRXP2B5MA?tab=summary&timestamp=177.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance & Strategy

  - [**Overall Site Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/hGcwBdh-CnMSEfK7CmMAHkosRXP2B5MA?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)
      - [Clicks & impressions down \~2% WoW, but the decline is moderating from \~6% drops earlier in October.](https://fathom.video/share/hGcwBdh-CnMSEfK7CmMAHkosRXP2B5MA?tab=summary&timestamp=444.0)
      - [This aligns with a market-wide trend of search volatility.](https://fathom.video/share/hGcwBdh-CnMSEfK7CmMAHkosRXP2B5MA?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)
      - [Stabilization is expected \~1 month after the Sept 22 Google spam update.](https://fathom.video/share/hGcwBdh-CnMSEfK7CmMAHkosRXP2B5MA?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)
  - [**Non-Branded Content:**](https://fathom.video/share/hGcwBdh-CnMSEfK7CmMAHkosRXP2B5MA?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)
      - [Grew 2.8% WoW, a counter-trend to the overall site decline.](https://fathom.video/share/hGcwBdh-CnMSEfK7CmMAHkosRXP2B5MA?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)
      - [Likely driven by strong performance from recently refreshed content.](https://fathom.video/share/hGcwBdh-CnMSEfK7CmMAHkosRXP2B5MA?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [**LLM Visibility:**](https://fathom.video/share/hGcwBdh-CnMSEfK7CmMAHkosRXP2B5MA?tab=summary&timestamp=817.0)
      - [Traffic rebounded sharply last week, though top positioning dropped 10 points.](https://fathom.video/share/hGcwBdh-CnMSEfK7CmMAHkosRXP2B5MA?tab=summary&timestamp=817.0)
      - [**Insight:** Mid-tier rankings (2-4) are valuable for driving clicks, as users compare options. The top result often provides the answer directly, reducing click-throughs.](https://fathom.video/share/hGcwBdh-CnMSEfK7CmMAHkosRXP2B5MA?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)
  - [**Content Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/hGcwBdh-CnMSEfK7CmMAHkosRXP2B5MA?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
      - [**Freshness:** Refreshing old content is a key signal for improving LLM visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/hGcwBdh-CnMSEfK7CmMAHkosRXP2B5MA?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
      - [**External Linking:** The current policy of minimal external linking hurts SEO authority.](https://fathom.video/share/hGcwBdh-CnMSEfK7CmMAHkosRXP2B5MA?tab=summary&timestamp=1216.0)
          - [**Rationale:** Signals low trust to Google and limits the use of authoritative stats.](https://fathom.video/share/hGcwBdh-CnMSEfK7CmMAHkosRXP2B5MA?tab=summary&timestamp=1216.0)
          - [**Solution:** GrowthX can block specific competitor domains to mitigate risk.](https://fathom.video/share/hGcwBdh-CnMSEfK7CmMAHkosRXP2B5MA?tab=summary&timestamp=1378.0)

### Technical SEO & Data Integrity

  - [**GA4 Data Duplicates:**](https://fathom.video/share/hGcwBdh-CnMSEfK7CmMAHkosRXP2B5MA?tab=summary&timestamp=955.0)
      - [Duplicate traffic sources in GA4 (e.g., multiple "organic" channels) cause inaccurate reporting in Looker.](https://fathom.video/share/hGcwBdh-CnMSEfK7CmMAHkosRXP2B5MA?tab=summary&timestamp=955.0)
      - [**Action:** Outreach's technical team must consolidate these sources.](https://fathom.video/share/hGcwBdh-CnMSEfK7CmMAHkosRXP2B5MA?tab=summary&timestamp=955.0)
  - [**UTM Parameter Crawl Waste:**](https://fathom.video/share/hGcwBdh-CnMSEfK7CmMAHkosRXP2B5MA?tab=summary&timestamp=1094.0)
      - [Google is wasting crawl budget on non-indexed URLs created by UTM parameters.](https://fathom.video/share/hGcwBdh-CnMSEfK7CmMAHkosRXP2B5MA?tab=summary&timestamp=1094.0)
      - [**Impact:** Harms technical SEO health and site trust.](https://fathom.video/share/hGcwBdh-CnMSEfK7CmMAHkosRXP2B5MA?tab=summary&timestamp=1165.0)
      - [**Action:** Outreach's technical team must fix this by de-indexing or disallowing these URLs.](https://fathom.video/share/hGcwBdh-CnMSEfK7CmMAHkosRXP2B5MA?tab=summary&timestamp=1094.0)

### Team Enablement & Data Clarification

  - [**Gong Analysis Discrepancy:**](https://fathom.video/share/hGcwBdh-CnMSEfK7CmMAHkosRXP2B5MA?tab=summary&timestamp=1550.0)
      - [**Issue:** A prompt ("platforms that unify prospect engagement...") showed a "perfect score" in an old LLM report but "zero presence" in the new Gong analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/hGcwBdh-CnMSEfK7CmMAHkosRXP2B5MA?tab=summary&timestamp=1550.0)
      - [**Action:** Megan will investigate, noting that LLM visibility is highly volatile and changes frequently.](https://fathom.video/share/hGcwBdh-CnMSEfK7CmMAHkosRXP2B5MA?tab=summary&timestamp=1662.0)
  - [**LLM Training Request:**](https://fathom.video/share/hGcwBdh-CnMSEfK7CmMAHkosRXP2B5MA?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)
      - [Outreach requested an LLM "lunch and learn" for the team.](https://fathom.video/share/hGcwBdh-CnMSEfK7CmMAHkosRXP2B5MA?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)
      - [**Action:** Megan will explore hosting a session, potentially timed with the launch of GrowthX's new LLM tool.](https://fathom.video/share/hGcwBdh-CnMSEfK7CmMAHkosRXP2B5MA?tab=summary&timestamp=1853.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Outreach Team (Hadassah, Maria, Cade):**](https://fathom.video/share/hGcwBdh-CnMSEfK7CmMAHkosRXP2B5MA?tab=summary&timestamp=177.0)
      - [Review 63 new content ideas in Airtable and update their status.](https://fathom.video/share/hGcwBdh-CnMSEfK7CmMAHkosRXP2B5MA?tab=summary&timestamp=177.0)
      - [Escalate the GA4 and UTM technical SEO issues to the internal team.](https://fathom.video/share/hGcwBdh-CnMSEfK7CmMAHkosRXP2B5MA?tab=summary&timestamp=955.0)
      - [Discuss the external linking policy with Kaylee (Director of Comms) and request a list of blocked domains.](https://fathom.video/share/hGcwBdh-CnMSEfK7CmMAHkosRXP2B5MA?tab=summary&timestamp=1216.0)
  - [**GrowthX Team (Megan):**](https://fathom.video/share/hGcwBdh-CnMSEfK7CmMAHkosRXP2B5MA?tab=summary&timestamp=1550.0)
      - [Investigate the Gong analysis data discrepancy.](https://fathom.video/share/hGcwBdh-CnMSEfK7CmMAHkosRXP2B5MA?tab=summary&timestamp=1550.0)
      - [Explore hosting an LLM training session for the Outreach team.](https://fathom.video/share/hGcwBdh-CnMSEfK7CmMAHkosRXP2B5MA?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)
      - [Share links to GrowthX's LLM-focused podcast episodes.](https://fathom.video/share/hGcwBdh-CnMSEfK7CmMAHkosRXP2B5MA?tab=summary&timestamp=1803.0)
